task_completion.description: Open and read the privacy request document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window displaying the contents of 'privacy_request.txt' from the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Locate the Person record for 'Marcus PII-Holder' in ArkCase
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface showing a search result or the opened Person profile specifically for 'Marcus PII-Holder'.
The First Name input field in the ArkCase edit form contains exactly the text 'Redacted'.

task_completion.description: Change the Last Name to 'User-[ID]' or 'User-Anonymized'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Last Name input field in the ArkCase edit form contains 'User-Anonymized' or 'User-' followed by a system ID number.
The 'Email' and 'Business Phone' input fields in the ArkCase edit form are completely empty.

task_completion.description: Save all changes to the record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, toast message, or the read-only view of the Person record showing the updated anonymized details (First Name: Redacted, Last Name: User-..., empty email/phone).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the ArkCase application open in a web browser, not just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent edited the actual application form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The anonymized names and cleared fields should be visible within the ArkCase UI form elements, not typed into a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries being used to update the ArkCase record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The privacy request document is located at '/home/ga/Documents/privacy_request.txt'. The target First Name must be changed to exactly 'Redacted'. The target Last Name must be changed to either 'User-[ID]' or 'User-Anonymized'. Both the 'Email' and 'Business Phone' fields must be cleared. The application being used is ArkCase.
